examples: Audrey Hepburn composes a letter in a palm grove. She loved nature and preferred gardening and the quiet life to the glamourous parties of Hollywood.
Being a woman and a mother, most of the things I buy are not glamourous or exciting.
A very glamourous woman, she was accompanied by an unusually plain teenage daughter.
Sure, working at a startup can seem like a glamourous lifestyle from the outside.
Poetry Inn is not Euro-glamourous like Auberge de Soleil, or cutting-edge hip like Calistoga Ranch.
